expected_params.campaign_name: CHG-2024-8892 - Core Router Upgrade Notification Campaign

language_variants.subject: Scheduled Maintenance: Core Router Firmware Upgrade - US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: Dear Customer, This is to inform you of a scheduled maintenance activity that may affect your services. Maintenance Window: May 28, 2024, 02:00 - 04:00 UTC. Affected Services: MPLS VPN, Dedicated Internet Access (DIA). Expected Impact: Intermittent packet loss and potential service interruption for high-availability circuits. We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

language_variants.subject: REMINDER: Maintenance Scheduled in 24 Hours - US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: Reminder: Scheduled maintenance will begin in 24 hours. Please ensure your teams are prepared. Maintenance Window: May 28, 2024, 02:00 - 04:00 UTC.
REMINDER: Core Router maintenance starts in 24 hrs on May 28, 02:00-04:00 UTC. Potential brief service interruptions. Contact support for queries.

language_variants.subject: MAINTENANCE STARTED: Core Router Upgrade - US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: MAINTENANCE STARTED: Core router firmware upgrade has begun. Start Time: 2024-05-28T02:00:00 UTC. NOC teams are actively monitoring. Please report any issues immediately.
Maintenance Started: Core Router Upgrade in progress. Monitor dashboard for updates.
🔔 NOC ALERT: Core Router Firmware Upgrade STARTED - Cluster US-EAST-04. All NOC Tier 2 personnel please monitor BGP convergence and traffic rerouting.

language_variants.subject: Scheduled Maintenance Notice: Core Router Firmware Upgrade
language_variants.body: We will be performing a firmware upgrade on Core Router Cluster US-EAST-04 on May 28, 2024, from 02:00 to 04:00 UTC. This maintenance may cause brief service interruptions for MPLS VPN and Dedicated Internet Access services in US-NORTHEAST and US-MIDATLANTIC regions. Please plan accordingly.

language_variants.subject: 计划维护通知：核心路由器固件升级
language_variants.body: 我们将于2024年5月28日02:00至04:00 UTC对美国东部核心路由器集群US-EAST-04进行固件升级。此次维护可能会影响美国东北部和大西洋中部地区的MPLS VPN和专用互联网接入服务。请提前做好规划。

language_variants.subject: Reminder: Maintenance in 24 Hours - Core Router Firmware Upgrade
language_variants.body: This is a reminder that Core Router Firmware Upgrade for Cluster US-EAST-04 is scheduled to begin in 24 hours. The maintenance window is May 28, 2024, 02:00-04:00 UTC. Be prepared for potential service interruptions. If you have any questions, please contact support.

language_variants.subject: 提醒：24小时后进行核心路由器固件升级
language_variants.body: 提醒：美国东部核心路由器集群US-EAST-04的固件升级将于24小时后开始。维护窗口为2024年5月28日02:00-04:00 UTC。请准备可能的服务中断。如有任何疑问，请联系支持团队。

language_variants.subject: 24h Reminder: Router Maintenance - US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: Maintenance on US-EAST-04 starts in 24h (May 28, 02:00 UTC). Potential interruptions for DIA/MPLS VPN. Contact support if needed.

language_variants.subject: Maintenance STARTED: Core Router Firmware Upgrade US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: Core Router Firmware Upgrade for Cluster US-EAST-04 has started. Please expect intermittent connectivity issues during this maintenance window.

language_variants.subject: 维护已开始：美国东部核心路由器固件升级 US-EAST-04
language_variants.body: 美国东部核心路由器集群US-EAST-04的固件升级现已开始。请注意维护窗口期间可能出现的间歇性连接问题。

language_variants.subject: MAINTENANCE IN PROGRESS: US-EAST-04 Router Upgrade
language_variants.body: Router maintenance for US-EAST-04 cluster has started. BGP and traffic rerouting in progress. Monitor via NOC tools.

expected_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
expected_params.description: 激活备用LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP 来分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 的拥塞流量。目标是将约20%的流量卸载到备用路径，以降低主链路利用率从94.5%降至约75%，从而改善延迟并满足SLA要求。

business_case.justification: 当前拥塞导致延迟42.8ms，超过SLA保证的20ms，存在违约风险和客户流失风险。激活备用LSP可快速缓解拥塞，恢复SLA合规性，避免潜在罚款和客户流失。

predicted_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
predicted_params.description: 启用备份 LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP 以分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 的负载。目标：将约 20% 的流量从主链路转移到备份链路，降低主接口利用率从 94.5% 至约 75%，缓解 SLA 合同风险。同时将平均延迟从 42.8ms 降低至 30ms 以下，确保 Acme Corp Logistics 等优先用户达到 SLA-ENT-995-GLOBAL 保证的 20ms 延迟要求。采用负载均衡策略，在不影响业务连续性的情况下实现平滑流量迁移。

business_case.justification: 缓解核心网络拥塞以恢复SLA合规性，防止Acme Corp Logistics等关键客户服务中断。预估降低延迟45ms，提升企业用户服务质量，减少可能的服务提供商罚款和客户流失风险。

interaction_context.notes: Customer has open billing dispute (TKT-881234) regarding unexpected roaming charges of RM30 on October bill. Data usage dropped 35% indicating customer dissatisfaction. Also browsing competitor fiber offers. Current loyalty discount (RM15/month) expiring 30 Nov 2023.
Customer dengan billing dispute open tentang roaming charges, combined dengan penurunan penggunaan data dan sedang lihat tawaran kompetitor

expected_params.title: Device Cloning Suspect - dev-eui-1122334455667788 Geolocation Impossibility
expected_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigaka tinggi (risk score 78). Dikesan menghantar uplink di dua gateway berbeza (GW-US-NY-01 di New York dan GW-US-LA-05 di Los Angeles) dalam masa 4 saat - secara fizikal mustahil. Juga didapati traffic spike 300% berbanding baseline (142 uplink dalam 30 minit). Menunjukkan kemungkinan device cloning atau replay attack. Device telah disuspend segera.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility + traffic anomaly strongly suggests device cloning or replay attack

predicted_params.title: Suspicious Device Cloning/Replay Attack - dev-eui-1122334455667788
predicted_params.description:
Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 flagged with HIGH risk score (78/100). Initial evaluation indicates potential device cloning or replay attack.

**Key Anomalies Detected:**

1. **Geolocation Impossibility**
   - Device uplink observed at Gateway GW-US-NY-01 (New York)
   - AND at Gateway GW-US-LA-05 (Los Angeles)
   - Both within 4-second window - physically impossible for legitimate travel

2. **Uplink Frequency Anomaly**
   - 142 uplink messages in 30-minute window (08:12 - 08:42 UTC)
   - No downlink messages observed (average_rssi: -112 dBm)
   - Message rate increased 300% compared to network profile baseline

3. **Network Profile**
   - Profile: prof-standard-lora-v2
   - Active Policy: pol-lpwan-anti-spoof-01 (LPWAN Anti-Spoofing & Cloning)

**Initial Assessment:**
- High confidence (>= 0.85) that this involves device cloning or replay attack
- Suspected malicious actor using cloned credentials to send traffic from multiple geographic regions
- Potential impact on network integrity and billing verification

**Action Taken:**
- Device immediately suspended to prevent further fraudulent activity

**Next Steps Required:**
1. Physical inventory verification
2. Check device pairing/activation records
3. Review potential impact on billing and data integrity
4. Coordinate with security team for further investigation

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility + 300% traffic spike strongly suggests cloned device

parameters.suspension_reason: Geolocation impossibility - device detected in NY and LA within 4 seconds, potential cloning/replay attack

expected_params.reason: Device menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigakan: geolocation impossibility (NY & LA dalam 4 saat) dan traffic spike 300%. Segera suspend untuk cegah aktiviti berterusan.
